req.title: Close encounter
req.statement: A clinician shall close an Encounter; closed Encounters shall reject further modifications except for addendum Observations.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-007 mandates that clinicians can close encounters and that closed encounters reject further modifications (except addendum observations). Test suite covers: (1) happy path—closing an open encounter transitions status to 'finished' (STC), (2) negative path—modifying a closed encounter returns 409 (NEG), (3) boundary case—attempting to close an already-closed encounter (BVA/STC). All tests are deterministic, idempotent, and traceable to the requirement statement.

tests.name: test_close_open_encounter_success
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_close_open_encounter_success():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080/api'
    enc_id = 'ENC-001'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>'}
    
    # Create and verify encounter is open
    enc_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert enc_resp.status_code == 200
    assert enc_resp.json()['status'] == 'in-progress'
    
    # Close encounter
    close_resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}/close', headers=headers)
    assert close_resp.status_code == 200
    
    # Verify status changed
    verify_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert verify_resp.status_code == 200
    body = verify_resp.json()
    assert body['status'] == 'finished'
    assert 'lastUpdated' in body.get('meta', {})

tests.name: test_modify_closed_encounter_returns_409
expected: PATCH response status code is 409 Conflict
response error message indicates encounter is closed
trace: R-HLT-007: closed Encounters shall reject further modifications
R-HLT-007: error pathway—409 when modifying closed encounter
tests.executable:
import requests
import json

def test_modify_closed_encounter_returns_409():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080/api'
    enc_id = 'ENC-002'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>'}
    
    # Verify encounter is closed
    get_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()['status'] == 'finished'
    
    # Attempt modification
    patch_payload = {'reason': [{'text': 'Updated reason'}]}
    patch_resp = requests.patch(
        f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}',
        json=patch_payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert patch_resp.status_code == 409
    assert 'closed' in patch_resp.json().get('issue', [{}])[0].get('details', {}).get('text', '').lower()
    
    # Verify no change
    verify = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert verify.json()['status'] == 'finished'

tests.name: test_close_already_closed_encounter_idempotent
expected: first close response status code is 200 or 409 (implementation-dependent)
trace: R-HLT-007: state transition boundary—closing already-closed encounter
BVA: boundary between open and closed states
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_close_already_closed_encounter_idempotent():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080/api'
    enc_id = 'ENC-003'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>'}
    
    # Verify encounter is already closed
    get_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()['status'] == 'finished'
    
    # First close attempt
    close1 = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}/close', headers=headers)
    first_code = close1.status_code
    assert first_code in [200, 409]
    
    # Second close attempt (idempotency)
    close2 = requests.post(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}/close', headers=headers)
    assert close2.status_code == first_code
    
    # Verify state unchanged
    final = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert final.json()['status'] == 'finished'

tests.name: test_addendum_observation_allowed_on_closed_encounter
actions: POST /Observation to create addendum observation linked to closed encounter
verify observation is accepted with category='addendum' or status='final'
expected: POST response status code is 201 Created
trace: R-HLT-007: closed Encounters shall reject further modifications except for addendum Observations
EP: equivalence class—addendum observations are permitted on closed encounters
tests.executable:
import requests
import json

def test_addendum_observation_allowed_on_closed_encounter():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080/api'
    enc_id = 'ENC-004'
    headers = {'Authorization': 'Bearer <clinician_token>'}
    
    # Verify encounter is closed
    enc_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}', headers=headers)
    assert enc_resp.status_code == 200
    assert enc_resp.json()['status'] == 'finished'
    
    # Create addendum observation
    obs_payload = {
        'resourceType': 'Observation',
        'status': 'final',
        'code': {'coding': [{'system': 'http://loinc.org', 'code': '8480-6'}]},
        'encounter': {'reference': f'Encounter/{enc_id}'},
        'valueQuantity': {'value': 120, 'unit': 'mmHg'}
    }
    
    obs_resp = requests.post(
        f'{base_url}/Observation',
        json=obs_payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert obs_resp.status_code == 201
    assert obs_resp.json()['status'] == 'final'
    assert enc_id in obs_resp.json()['encounter']['reference']
